prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
# The Shy Octopus

Deep in the swaying seagrass meadows of Coral Cove lived Ollie, an octopus with eight wiggly arms and a heart full of hopes. Ollie was the most brilliant shade of purple-blue you could imagine, with tiny speckles that shimmered like stars when sunlight filtered through the water. But whenever other sea creatures swam by, Ollie would change colors faster than you could say "jellyfish" and hide inside the snuggest rock crevice he could find. You see, more than anything in the whole wide ocean, Ollie wanted friends to play hide-and-seek with and to share his collection of pretty shells—but he was just so very, very shy.
